title: rosa caesia var. lintonii
intro: Rosa caesia var. lintonii, also known as the 'Linton's White Rose', is a type of fragrant, flowering rose plant that belongs to the Rosa genus and is native to the Himalayas. The medicinal properties of Rosa caesia var. lintonii include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic. The herbal preparations of Rosa caesia var. lintonii include making tea from its flowers and leaves, as well as using its extracts in traditional medicine and perfumery.
